title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed and focusing on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools produces durable skills across hype cycles. He asserts that AI cannot change people but people can change AI, positioning human-centered learning as more robust than tool-native approaches.
